summary: Comprehensive testing of Manager role, Team-based RBAC, and Import duplicate detection. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for all roles. All requested features working correctly.
passed_tests: Manager login works (manager@mhpfintech.com / Admin@123) - role: manager, team_code: TEAM-A
Agent login works (agent@mhpfintech.com / Admin@123) - has manager_id assigned correctly
RBAC: Admin sees ALL loans in the system
RBAC: Manager sees only team loans (own + assigned agent's loans)
RBAC: Agent sees only own loans (created_by = agent_id)
RBAC: Analytics/overview respects role-based filtering (Agent <= Manager <= Admin)
Manager can create a loan - visible to admin, agent sees only own loans
Export endpoint returns proper Excel file with readable column headers
Import with duplicate rows returns duplicates count > 0 and imported = 0
Import with new unique rows imports them successfully
User Management page shows Manager user with correct role badge (manager)
Agent has manager_id assigned pointing to Manager User
UI: Manager dropdown available when creating agent in User Management
UI: Export/Import buttons visible only for admin on MIS Board
UI: Agent correctly denied access to Export/Import buttons

seed_data_verification.agent_user: Exists with role 'agent', team_code 'TEAM-A', manager_id points to Manager User

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Manager role and RBAC features tested and working. Manager sees team loans (own + assigned agents). Agent sees only own loans. Import duplicate detection works based on customer_name + contact_no + bank. Export returns Excel with readable headers (Date, Customer Name, etc.). User Management shows manager dropdown when creating agents. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_rbac_import.py covers all RBAC scenarios.

manager_role.rbac: Sees own loans + assigned agents' loans

export.headers: Readable column headers (Date, Customer Name, Company Name, Contact No, Bank, Status, etc.)

user_management.agent_assignment: Manager dropdown available when creating agent
